overall.description: A smooth drone-style camera movement around the exterior of Johan Cruyff Arena (Ajax stadium) in a video game environment. The camera navigates from an open plaza past the curved stadium wall with the Ajax logo, along city streets with office buildings and sparse traffic, and through a shaded walkway. The footage features modern sports architecture with clear midday lighting and includes on-screen debug text indicating FPS.

agents.ego_description: floating forward through open plaza toward the stadium complex, passing green trees on the left

well-maintained green grass area in the foreground
multi-story contemporary office buildings with grid windows
large stadium structure visible in the distance with curved roof

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide open plaza with green grass and trees on the left. Modern office buildings stand in the distance as the camera floats forward toward the stadium complex under clear blue skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium exterior concourse with curved wall

events.description: Ajax Amsterdam logo becomes clearly visible on the stadium wall

agents.ego_description: moving along the curved exterior wall of the stadium, maintaining proximity to the facade

textured concrete curved facade of the stadium with vertical lines
modern glass curtain wall section of the stadium with reflective panels
metal support structures and framework of the stadium roof

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the stadium's curved exterior wall where the Ajax logo becomes visible. The scene features modern concrete and glass architecture with roof trusses overhead, transitioning from the open plaza to the stadium concourse area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with modern office buildings

events.description: white sedan drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: turning away from the stadium and moving along the city street, observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving along the road past the camera

tall white modern office building with grid-pattern windows

cars including a white sedan and black van on the road

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a city street lined with modern office buildings including a distinctive white tower and brown block structure. Sparse vehicle traffic including a white sedan passes by on the asphalt road as the stadium recedes from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: stadium entrance plaza with approach ramp

events.description: turning toward main stadium entrance from the street

agents.ego_description: turning back toward the stadium and approaching the main entrance ramp

entered.detail: wide paved ramp leading up to the stadium entrance with red painted edges
main entrance facade of the stadium with large glass panels and geometric patterns
red painted pedestrian walkway markings on the approach
low concrete bollards and barriers lining the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera turns from the street toward the stadium's main entrance, revealing a wide approach ramp with red painted walkways. The main stadium facade with its distinctive geometric window patterns and roof trusses dominates the view as the camera moves forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: shaded walkway between stadium and office building

events.description: entering shaded corridor between buildings, lighting becomes significantly darker

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow shaded passage between the stadium wall and adjacent glass building

entered.detail: narrow covered walkway with dark shadows cast by surrounding buildings
reflective glass curtain wall of adjacent office building
concrete exterior wall of the stadium with small windows

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow shaded corridor between the stadium and a glass office building, causing a dramatic lighting change to low light conditions. The passage features the stadium's concrete wall on one side and reflective glass on the other, with an open field visible in the distance ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open plaza into the shaded architectural corridors of the Johan Cruyff Arena complex. It begins by floating across a wide green plaza toward distant office buildings under a clear blue sky, before gliding along the stadium's curved exterior wall and passing the Ajax logo. As the camera turns onto a city street, the stadium recedes to make room for modern white and brown office towers and sparse vehicle traffic on the asphalt. The scene then shifts back toward the stadium's main entrance, moving up a wide approach ramp with red painted walkways toward the geometric facade and roof trusses. Finally, the camera enters a narrow corridor between the stadium's concrete wall and a reflective glass building, causing the lighting to drop dramatically as it heads toward an open field in the distance.
